subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims in June 1906
subcodes.first_line: See, how for the sake of a trifling gain, people subject themselves to terrible difficulties and suffering and trial... When we were in Tihran, Mirza Aqa Khan of Nur was the Prime Minister
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom
